The '''''Herald''-class shuttle''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] created by the [[Star Forge]] for use in the [[Jedi Civil War]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Jedi_Shadow_CG.jpg|thumb|left|220px|A Jedi Shadow sneaks aboard a ''Herald''-class shuttle]]
The craft was a 28 meter long design, lightly armed with two [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and crewed by two people.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
The ''Herald''-class was based on a [[Republic Fleet Systems]] design made in limited amounts before it was replaced by the [[Ministry-class orbital shuttle|''Ministry''-class orbital shuttle]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

The ''Herald'' was one of the few [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] mass-produced by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. They were used to ship equipment to and from [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including the precious [[Kolto/Legends|kolto]] of [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Herald''-class shuttle was first introduced in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] by [[BioWare]], released in [[July]] [[2003]]. ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2008]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] hardcover supplement, identified the ship as a ''Herald''-class shuttle, also giving technical details for the class.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
